questions.text: What does a Payment Advice in SAP detail?
options: The credit limit of the customer
What invoices are being paid and any deductions

questions.text: Which of the following is a feature of Automatic Clearing Rules?
What happens when a Deduction not linked to an invoice is processed?
options: A new line with the original invoice’s payment term appears
All linked invoices are automatically cleared
A new line appears with a blank payment term

questions.text: What is required for the auto-clearing of D2C and Retail invoices in Accounts Receivable?
options: A match in Reconciliation account number and other specified criteria
Manual intervention by a Credit Analyst
Daily manual clearance by the Cash Accountant

questions.text: What is the immediate result of using a pre-payment method for a customer?
options: Immediate release of the Delivery Order
Blockage at the Delivery Order level

questions.text: A new residual item is created with a new baseline date that is typically overdue when handling deductions not linked to an invoice.
All D2C and Retail postings require manual clearance by the Cash Service Analyst daily.
